payload.title: CI job: self-scan with SARIF upload
payload.description: RT-107 boundary: wire a CI job that runs `trust check --rules bugs --format sarif` over the workspace and uploads via github/codeql-action/upload-sarif, so Trust self-reports in the Security tab. Needs a clean (or trust.toml-allow-listed) baseline first; use continue-on-error until green.
